title: Ashland 5.6" Glass Bottle with Cork Decorative Jar for Weddings, Parties, Home Décor, Arts & Crafts - Bulk 12 Pack
description:
About this item
Versatile storage: These glass bottles by Ashland can be used to store a variety of items such as spices, condiments, and dried flowers.
Coordinating options: Team these bottles with other coordinating jars and bottles to create the perfect storage solutions for your home or office.
Food safe: Made of glass and cork, these bottles are food safe and can be used to store edible items without any worries.
Bulk pricing: Order in bulk to save time and money on your floral and floral accessory needs. Whether you need just a few or a lot, our budget-friendly pricing has got you covered.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
These are some great little apothecary jars!!!! They are of heavy glass and will handle some degree of mishandling. A while back we decided to redo our pantry and in the process, I bought some labels that I was going to attach to our spice jars (it never happened). Then I found these jars - So our pantry now has "Eye of Newt", "Love Potion", "Lover's Spell", " Dragon Blood" etc. What a great way to spice up the kitchen and entertain guests when sending them to the pantry to get fixings.Beautiful bottles and seem to be well
Made . Using them for a honey finshed bourbon to use as a gift for friends .Buen tamaño, cómpralo 👍
